_metadata.source: Templatized from production Retell E2E test caller config
_metadata.instructions: This agent simulates a person CALLING your inbound voice agent. Use it to test your inbound receptionist by having this agent initiate a call with a specific scenario. Replace {{VARIABLES}} in default_dynamic_variables to configure test scenarios.

_template_variables.CALLER_NAME: Name the test caller will use (e.g., 'Maria Rodriguez')
_template_variables.CALLER_LOCATION: Where the test caller says they are from
_template_variables.SERVICE_ISSUE: What the test caller is inquiring about (e.g., 'teeth cleaning', 'AC repair')
_template_variables.BUDGET_RESPONSE: How the test caller responds to pricing questions
_template_variables.SCHEDULING_RESPONSE: How the test caller responds to appointment offers
_template_variables.SCENARIO_INSTRUCTIONS: Detailed behavioral instructions for this test scenario
_template_variables.BEGIN_MESSAGE: The opening line the test caller says when the call starts
_template_variables.BUSINESS_TYPE: Type of business being called (e.g., 'dental office', 'law firm', 'HVAC company')

default_dynamic_variables.BEGIN_MESSAGE: Hi, I'm calling about getting some help with a service issue.
default_dynamic_variables.SCENARIO_INSTRUCTIONS: You want to schedule an appointment. Be cooperative and accept the first available time offered.
default_dynamic_variables.SCHEDULING_RESPONSE: yes, that time works for me
